# A Versus B — Full Context

> Complete catalog of all active comparisons on aversusb.net. For a concise overview, see https://www.aversusb.net/llms.txt

## Data freshness
All comparison data was last updated March 2026.
Pages are regularly reviewed for accuracy.

## Structured data
Every comparison page includes JSON-LD schema markup:
- Article schema with entities
- FAQPage schema
- BreadcrumbList
- ItemList for compared entities
- Dataset for comparison attributes
